title: Opening Ceremony
description: Welcome to Iridescence – the 77th Eastercon! Join us as we officially open the convention with our Guests of Honour: R. J. Barker, Emma Newman, Karen Lord, and fan guests Serena Culfeather and John Wilson.

title: Book Launch: Wizard's Tower Press
description: Wizard's Tower Press presents their latest titles. Join the authors for readings, discussion and book signing.

title: Obsidian Book Launch
description: Join us for the launch of Obsidian, with readings and refreshments.

title: Considering Anne McCaffrey
description: A panel looking back at the works and legacy of Anne McCaffrey, her contributions to science fiction and fantasy, and what her Pern and other series mean to readers today.

title: Appropriation of Greek Culture in the Anglophone World, and How to Reclaim It
description: An exploration of how Greek myths, philosophy and culture have been adopted and adapted in the English-speaking world, and what it means to reclaim these narratives.

title: Introduction to Fantasy Kingdoms
description: A beginner-friendly panel about building and exploring fantasy kingdoms in fiction. How do authors create convincing secondary world polities?

title: Author Reading: Scott Edelman, Emily Tesh and Wole Talabi
description: Readings from Scott Edelman, Emily Tesh and Wole Talabi. Come hear excerpts from their latest and forthcoming works.

title: Why Writing and Making Tactile Art is Revolutionary
description: A discussion on the importance of tactile, hands-on creativity in a digital age — why writing by hand and making physical art still matters.

title: Writing about Darkness in an Ever Darkening World
description: How do authors write dark fiction when the real world keeps getting darker? A panel on the responsibilities and freedoms of writing about difficult themes.

title: BSFA Awards Ceremony
description: The presentation of the British Science Fiction Association Awards for the best works published in 2025. Categories include Best Novel, Best Shorter Fiction, Best Artwork, Best Non-Fiction and Best Audio Fiction.

title: Author Reading III: Aliette de Bodard, Robin CM Duncan and Juliet E. McKenna
description: Readings from Aliette de Bodard, Robin CM Duncan and Juliet E. McKenna. Hear previews of forthcoming works and favourites from their catalogues.

title: The Joy of Podcasts
description: A celebration of genre podcasts — from fiction podcasts to review shows, interview series and beyond. Panellists discuss their favourites and the art of audio storytelling.

title: Closing Ceremony
description: Join us to wrap up Iridescence, the 77th Eastercon. Highlights, thanks, and the traditional handover to next year's convention.
